title: Instant Swords
description: A mod that's adds 10+ new awesome swords
body:
⚔️** Instant Swords **– Powerful but Fragile! 🔥⚡

Add some spark to your Minecraft experience with Instant Swords!
This mod introduces a set of highly powerful swords with low durability, perfect for fast-paced PvP or dramatic mob battles!
✨ Features:

    Electro Stick ⚡ – A one-of-a-kind item that summons lightning on impact!

    Fire Sword 🔥 – Burns enemies alive with each strike!

    Two secret items inspired by the Minecraft movie...
    (Curious? Download and discover them yourself!)

    And more...

💥 More swords are planned in future updates – stay tuned!

📦 Requirements:

    Fabric API (for Fabric version)

📣 Feedback is welcome!
Leave a comment if you like the mod or want to suggest a new sword!
